description_long: This rifle features a classic design reminiscent of the AK-47, with a wooden fixed stock and handguard, and a matte black metal receiver and barrel assembly. The stock and foregrip are colored in a warm, natural wood tone, contrasting with the dark metallic components. The rifle is equipped with a curved detachable box magazine, also finished in black, and a prominent front sight post. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a simple muzzle device. The trigger, magazine release, and safety lever are all visible, indicating standard manual operation. The overall build suggests a robust, utilitarian firearm suitable for urban or rugged environments.
description: A classic-style rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. The design is robust and utilitarian, featuring a prominent front sight and long barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden stock, handguard, black receiver, curved magazine, and full barrel profile.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel, front sight post, and the alignment of the stock and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, handguard, black receiver, and the magazine from a mirrored perspective.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the rifle's body and barrel.
